name: renderkid-agent-setup
description: Mindtickle UI skills and Claude Code companion plugins for code-first AI tools.

plugins.name: mindtickle-ui
plugins.description: Claude Code companion plugin for Mindtickle UI. Adds /mt-init to set up new projects, /mt-migrate to upgrade from legacy tokens and APIs, and session-start discovery while the full guidance lives in the universal skill bundle.
